shared_properties: Umbra keeps a 32x48 px shadow-creature silhouette with a rounded crest, tapered arms, and a lower mist fringe.
Core palette metadata remains primary #C9A84C, background #0D0B14, and accent #D4682A while local violet and teal tones stay inside specs.colors_hex.
The pose preserves clear hand negative space so later grab-state swaps remain readable.
differences: This base state shows neutral breathing inside a safe shadow region.
Six frames cycle shoulder lift, eye-glow shimmer, and mist-fringe drift rather than locomotion or damage feedback.
Glow intensity stays lower than beam-white hazards so the player body never resembles a light source.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra size, safe-shadow survival, and the player-state animation list.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the silhouette-first dusk mood and the gold-violet contrast target.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra body proportion and edge treatment for the base state.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with TextureAtlasLayout and FixedUpdate-driven animation timers.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load the idle atlas during FloorLoading and register it as the base visual for UmbraActor.
runtime_notes: Advance frames at 8 fps under FixedUpdate.
Keep the origin at center-bottom so state swaps align on one collision capsule.
Bake eye glow into the sheet so atlas indexing stays deterministic.

context.usage: Default player state used in safe shadow lanes before movement or interaction begins.

pose_notes: Head crest rises 3 px above the shoulder line.
Mist fringe occupies the bottom 6 px.
Eye-glow cluster occupies a 4x2 px region in the upper torso silhouette.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 192x48 px with 6 frames of 32x48 px and 0 px spacing.
Umbra silhouette reads clearly against both void-dark and exposure-white regions.
Idle motion remains subtle and does not imitate run, grab, or damage states.
